component.name: Xaloqi EDS
component.description: Production-grade UDS/ISO-TP/DoIP diagnostics stack for automotive ECUs (ASIL-B candidate, ISO 14229 / ISO 15765-2 / ISO 13400-2)

components.name: zephyr
components.description: Primary RTOS target. Revision v3.7.0 is pinned in west.yml. Provides RTOS services, CAN driver, NVS storage, networking stack, and DTS-based board abstraction used by the Zephyr platform port.

components.name: FreeRTOS-Kernel
components.description: Optional RTOS for EDS_PLATFORM=freertos builds. Version is customer-provided at integration time via the FREERTOS_DIR cmake variable; the EDS repository does not pin a specific FreeRTOS-Kernel version. Minimum tested: v10.5.0.

components.name: lwip
components.description: TCP/IP stack used by the DoIP (ISO 13400-2) transport layer. On Zephyr: bundled as a Zephyr module (v2.2.0 in Zephyr 3.7.0, Apache-2.0 relicensed). On FreeRTOS: customer-provided. EDS calls only the platform abstraction layer (eds_doip_platform_ops_t) — lwip_* functions are never called directly from doip_server.c.

components.name: unity
components.description: Lightweight C test assertion framework. In-house implementation in project/unity/unity.c — not the ThrowTheSwitch Unity library. Used only in host-side unit tests (build_tests.sh); never compiled into firmware or delivery ZIPs. Source: project/unity/unity.h, project/unity/unity.c.
